zh.lifeSummary: 當Jehan de Cocquiel於大約1529年出生在比利時海瑙特圖爾奈時，他的父親Caron Cocquiel dit Mercier56歲，母親Jehenne Havet49歲。他於從1550年到1555年與Peronne de la Houe在比利時結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1579年10月18日在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.Tournai, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France: 法国巴-諾門迪奧內圖乃-素-迪武斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jehan de Cocquiel于大约1529年出生在比利时海瑙特圖爾奈时，他的父亲Caron Cocquiel dit Mercier56岁，母亲Jehenne Havet49岁。他于从1550年到1555年与Peronne de la Houe在比利时结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1579年10月18日在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jehan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jan
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: Jon
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jehan de Cocquiel was born about 1529, in Tournai, Hainaut, Belgium, his father, Caron Cocquiel dit Mercier, was 56 and his mother, Jehenne Havet, was 49. He married Peronne de la Houe from 1550 to 1555, in Belgium. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 18 October 1579, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jehan de Cocquiel est né environ 1529, à Tournai, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Caron Cocquiel dit Mercier, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Jehenne Havet, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Peronne de la Houe du 1550 au 1555, à Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 18 octobre 1579, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jehan de Cocquiel um 1529 in Tournai, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Caron Cocquiel dit Mercier 56 und seine Mutter Jehenne Havet 49. Er hat von 1550 bis 1555 in Belgien Peronne de la Houe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 18. Oktober 1579 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jehan de Cocquiel è nato il circa 1529 nel Tournai, Hainaut, Belgio, il suo padre, Caron Cocquiel dit Mercier, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Jehenne Havet, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Peronne de la Houe da 1550 a 1555, nel Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 18 ottobre 1579, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jehan de Cocquielが約1529年にベルギーヘイナトトウルナイで生まれた時，父Caron Cocquiel dit Mercierは56歳，母Jehenne Havetは49歳であった。から1550年まで1555年にベルギーでPeronne de la Houeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1579年10月18日に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jehan de Cocquiel(이)가 대략 1529년 벨기에 하인오트 토우른아이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Caron Cocquiel dit Mercier(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Jehenne Havet(은)는 49세였다. 그는 1550년 부터 1555년 까지 벨기에에서 Peronne de la Houe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1579년 10월 18일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jehan de Cocquiel nasceu aproximadamente 1529, em Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Caron Cocquiel dit Mercier, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Jehenne Havet, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com Peronne de la Houe de 1550 a 1555, em Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1579, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jehan de Cocquiel родился около 1529 г. в местности тоурнеи, ханаут, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Caron Cocquiel dit Mercier было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Jehenne Havet, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Peronne de la Houe с 1550 по 1555 в местности Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 18 октября 1579 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

sm.BET 1550 AND 1555: mai le 1550 e o'o I le 1555

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jehan de Cocquiel nació aproximadamente 1529, en Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Caron Cocquiel dit Mercier, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Jehenne Havet, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Peronne de la Houe desde 1550 hasta 1555, en Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1579, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
